title: phaseolus coccineus subsp. polyanthus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus subsp. polyanthus, also known as the scarlet runner bean or runner bean, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids. The health benefits of Phaseolus coccineus subsp. polyanthus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to make teas and tonics that are rich in nutrients and offer various health benefits.
